title: Mechanisms and precision interventions in sarcopenia and osteoarthritis comorbidity: A narrative review.
snippet: Sarcopenia and osteoarthritis are two common musculoskeletal disorders that often coexist, posing significant challenges in clinical management. These conditions share underlying mechanisms such as chronic inflammation, metabolic dysfunction, and biomechanical stress, which accelerate musculoskeletal degeneration.
